prompt: Generate a dynamic computer graphics scene: The jacket and shirt from image 1 are dissolving into a swarm of particles. Utilize the layered texture and muted color palette seen in image 2 for the appearance and behavior of the particle effect, creating a digital disintegration simulation.
prompt_refined: Generate a dynamic computer graphics scene where the dark blue bomber jacket and light blue polo shirt from image 1 are undergoing a digital disintegration. They are dissolving into a dense swarm of particles. These particles should visually emulate the subtle layered fabric texture and adopt the muted color palette (including beige, off-white, and light blue tones) observed in the garments from image 2. The overall scene should clearly depict a precise digital disintegration simulation.
objects: Particles emulating subtle layered fabric texture
Particles in a muted color palette (beige, off-white, light blue tones)
Visual elements depicting a precise digital disintegration simulation
